Little Meme
Big Dream

Welcome to Kishu's Community Homepage, the ultimate hub for all enthusiasts of Kishu Inu! We offer informative and educational content on our site that keep you updated about the world of Kishu Inu.

Show/Hide Community Safety Message
Community Safety:

Kishu Inu is an ERC20 token and is ONLY on the Ethereum blockchain. It is stored and transacted through Ethereum addresses (Identified by the "0x" at the beginning of each address.) and require gas fees for transactions. Kishu can be held in both decentralized (DEX) wallets and some supported centralized (CEX) exchanges.



BEWARE OF SCAMS.
Kishu Inu is NOT undergoing ANY type of airdrop(s), merger, migration, convergence, integration, relaunch, or any similar terms/processes.

Be cautious of misinformation and scams that use terms like airdrop(s), merging, migration, converging, integrating, relaunch, etc., to mislead holders. Kishu Inu rewards are automatically distributed just by holding the tokens in your ERC20 DEX wallet—no other action is required to claim these rewards. Participating CEXs have their own terms and conditions for claiming rewards.


Kishu's Contract Address:
  • 0xA2b4C0Af19cC16a6CfAcCe81F192B024d625817D
  • Decimal: 9
  • Slippage: 4-7%
NEVER share your wallet's seed phrase or any private keys with ANYONE.
Visit Our Official Linktr.ee 

Kishu Inu ($KISHU) is a community-focused, decentralized cryptocurrency with instant rewards thanks to active users!🐶

Kishu was created in April 2021 with the goal of being a decentralized meme project with true purpose. Unlike older, comparable projects, Kishu introduces holders to next-gen concepts such as participation rewards, NFTs, decentralized exchanges, and more.

Little Meme. Big Dream.

Contract Address (CA)
0xA2b4C0Af19cC16a6CfAcCe81F192B024d625817D

  • 🔴 Decimal: 9
  • 🔣 Slippage: 4-7%
  • 💰 2% Redistribution Awards for:
    • All Holders in DEX Wallets (Check Daily)
    • Some Holders in CEX Wallets (Each CEX is different.)


For every active user transaction, a 2% KISHU reward is granted to holders: decentralized wallets only, fostering a healthy distributed network and community usage. The more KISHU is actively used, the more rewards are granted.


KISHU is fully decentralized and owned by its fun, vibrant community. Our enthusiast volunteers welcome and embrace diverse perspectives to build KISHU into the best community in crypto.


The KISHU smart contract has been fully audited by a top specialized team and its LP (Liquidity Pool) tokens have been burnt. That means next to zero risk to our users and community from potential bad actors.

$KISHU token is available on the Ethereum blockchain. Metamask is a third party ERC20 (Ethereum) browser wallet, and the very best at that! On Google Chrome, visit metamask.io to download the extension and setup a wallet. On mobile? Get MetaMask's app for iPhone or Android.
Acquire Ethereum through MetaMask itself or transfer it to your MetaMask wallet address from another wallet (e.g. Coinbase or Binance).
You can currently swap ETH and other tokens for $KISHU on any erc20 supported Decentralized Exchange (DEX).
Kishu
Enter the amount of $ETH you would like to swap for $KISHU. Click Connect Wallet then Swap

Kishu Inu stats on CoinMarketCap

Kishu Inu stats on CoinGecko

Kishu Inu on Dextools.io


KISHU launched on April 17, 2021, swiftly rising to prominence among 2021’s standout cryptocurrencies. The dynamic roadmap of community milestones outlines the critical achievements targeted to sustain swift, decentralized development.

What does Kishu aim to achieve?

As stated in the Whitepaper; Kishu aims to bring popular cryptocurrency concepts to the mainstream with ease.

That being said, we aim for Kishu to be turned into a global brand which will have as many real world use cases as possible through partnering up with the biggest companies in various industries, while also helping those in need through charities.

How does the Kishu reward system work?

For every active user's transaction a 2% $KISHU reward is granted to holders’ decentralized wallets only, fostering a healthy distributed network and community usage.

Where do I get the rewards?

The more KISHU is actively used, the more rewards are granted!

What is "burning" and why does it matter?

Token burning is the process of permanently removing a portion of tokens from circulation, reducing the total supply.

Does Kishu burn automatically?

We have made the burn wallet into one of the biggest holders through buy-backs and manually burning most of the founders' tokens. Taking into consideration how the reward system works; the more Kishu a wallet holds, the more rewards will be granted; in this case, the more KISHU in the burn wallet, the more Kishu will be burned with every transaction.

See the Burn Address

Contact Info

Thank you for visiting our website! Your presence here is greatly appreciated, and we truly value the feedback we receive from our visitors. We are always eager to hear what you think—whether it’s a question, a comment, or a concern, please don’t hesitate to use the conveniently located contact form to reach out to us. Your interactions help us to continually improve and strive to provide the best possible user experience. We appreciate your interest and engagement and look forward to your correspondence. Thank you for taking the time to connect with us, and we hope to hear from you soon!

Contact form

Disclaimer

We are a participant in various affiliate advertising programs, including but not limited to the Amazon Associates Program,ClickBank Affiliate Program, CJ Affiliate, ShareASale, eBay Partner Network, Rakuten Advertising, Awin, PartnerStack, TradeDoubler, Pepperjam, Post Affiliate Pro, TUNE, Tapfiliate, FlexOffers, Digistore24 Affiliate Program, and Avangate Affiliate Network. These programs are designed to provide a means for us to earn commissions by linking to their products and affiliated sites. When you use our links to access these sites and make a purchase through our affiliate links, we may earn a commission from qualifying purchases at no additional cost to you. We promote products and services that align with our values, and we appreciate your support in using our affiliate links to make your purchases. This helps us to continue providing quality content. Please note that certain logos, such as Amazon's, are registered trademarks of their respective owners, and their use is subject to the company's trademark policies and guidelines. It's important to understand that some of the links on our site are affiliate links. This means if you click on the link and purchase the item, we will receive an affiliate commission at no extra cost to you. All opinions remain our own. We only recommend products we believe will add value to our readers. We are disclosing this in accordance with the Federal Trade Commission’s 16 CFR, Part 255: “Guides Concerning the Use of Endorsements and Testimonials in Advertising.” No free products, services, or anything else by these companies are received in exchange for mentioning them on the site. The only consideration is in the form of affiliate commissions. Please note that the products and services we recommend are not guaranteed to produce specific results. Everyone's body, health status, and personal circumstances vary, and thus the outcomes can differ greatly. This applies to potential income as well; individual success depends on one's unique skill set, business acumen, networking abilities, and effort. Therefore, the income level achieved by each individual can vary widely. There is no guarantee that you will make any income at all from the products and services promoted on this site. Always consult with a healthcare professional before starting any new diet or exercise program. Always conduct your own due diligence before embarking on any business endeavor. Results from any products, services, or materials found on our site will vary. The content provided on this page is solely for educational purposes and is intended to offer insights and information related to cryptocurrency. It should NOT be construed as financial advice, recommendations, or endorsements of any particular investment strategy or cryptocurrency. Cryptocurrency investments carry a high level of risk and may NOT be suitable for all investors. The value of cryptocurrencies can fluctuate widely, and investors may lose their entire investment. Before making any investment decisions, we strongly advise conducting your own research and consulting with a qualified financial advisor. We do NOT assume responsibility for any losses incurred as a result of the information or resources provided here. By using this page, you acknowledge and agree that you are solely responsible for your investment decisions. Please be aware that all projects listed within the Kishu Ecosystem are initiated and developed by dedicated community volunteers. Due to the collaborative and dynamic nature of these initiatives, the functionality, features, and development timelines may be subject to change or may even end. This means projects could lose developer support or be discontinued altogether over time. Participation in any of these projects is at your own discretion and risk. The information provided here is for educational purposes only and should not be considered as financial advice. We strongly urge any community members to conduct thorough research and carefully assess their financial circumstances prior to engaging/participating in any community project. Our page provides educational content, partnerships, and affiliate links for resource enhancement. Note that we do NOT control third-party practices and disclaim responsibility for actions based on their information. Users should research before engaging with any third-party services or products. Engagements through our links are at your own risk; we do NOT endorse third-party effectiveness. Content is for educational purposes only, NOT financial advice. Investment involves risk; consult professionals before decision-making. Please note, we may receive compensation from affiliate links at no extra cost to you, supporting our educational content. Using our page signifies acceptance of these terms and acknowledgment that we're NOT liable for your financial decisions.
